allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('resources/frontend-zh-CN.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'Total entries: {len\(d\)}'\); empty=[k for k,v in d.items\(\) if not v.strip\(\)]; print\(f'Empty entries: {len\(empty\)}'\); untranslated=[k for k,v in d.items\(\) if v.strip\(\)==k]; print\(f'Untranslated \(value=key\): {len\(untranslated\)}'\)")
